calendar.matters:
Petition For Authorization To Distribute Trust Assets To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Amend Trust Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Reduction Of Bond
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Reduction Of Bond
Off Calendar Apr-09-2007 Continued To Apr-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Reduction Of Bond
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Continued To Apr-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Theodore Kolb appearing for trustee. The LA Court ordered a bond. Court will allow the bond to be exonerated after the funds are placed into a blocked account and the receipt filed. Matter is continued to 4/9. Counsel to submit a proposed orde to include the blocked account provision.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
